author: Arezoo Montazeri
text: Moeid guided me very patiently and carefully. They took time to explain things clearly and answered all my questions. We talked about career choices, the job market, and how to improve my resume. Their advice was practical, clear, and very helpful. I really appreciate his support and guidance.

author: Muhammad Ganji Nezhad
text: Moeid is a genuinely honest and patient person. I had a really helpful session with him. He carefully listened to my career and business concerns and helped clear up many of my doubts. The conversation was practical and insightful. I truly appreciate that he even invited me to another free session to keep moving forward. Highly recommended.

author: Kiyarash Hadidian
text: I really enjoyed my session with Moeid. The conversation was honest, practical, and straight to the point. He helped me see my career path more clearly and pointed out a few things I should improve that I hadn’t noticed before. What I liked most was that his advice was realistic and based on real experience, not just general tips. I left the session with a clearer direction and concrete next steps. Definitely recommend talking to him if you're serious about improving your career.

author: Majid Roodi
text: My session with Mr. Moeid was one of the best experiences of my life; during our conversation, we discussed new technologies and the transfer of experience. He very patiently checked my resume and took me through all my problems step by step, completely guiding me on what I should do.
